我叫卡德·凯恩，是个穿越者，路飞的第3个哥哥，一位有着粉色头发的普通少年。
本来有着一份海兵工作，凭借着和卡普的爷孙关系，完全可以像黄猿那样打卡上班，做个文职小兵是没问题的，直到我带着卡普老爷子一起去了那座岛，吃了那个果实，一切都变了。

哪来的谣言，什么叫我是四皇凯多和BIG MOM的私生子。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/09f3191a472bac5f447bf9ed6794d64e","author":"闷大肠","author_id":"","book_id":"7580331362670890046","book_name":"海贼：红色加白色等于你的粉色","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e07070","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7580360591269708350","read_count":"43740","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"647742"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"263","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,海贼,单女主,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/481a0fc65054fcde6ea33785102cacb0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779317222&x-signature=csFHYNWNReKW0MOOnIbcz8GWGYM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"110546045430","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"195"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220647023DCA61648E77C67028CE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9313,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18701,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9801},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607007958721381144","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"都二刷了才想起来没点评，刚好最近重刷了一遍red，刚好在这里唠一唠
就这本书而言，前20多张算是低开了，但是随着乌塔上线，顶上战争展开，以及现阶段计划，正在迈向高走。
再到人物刻画，除了主角以外，最重头戏的绝对就是乌塔了，本书的乌塔是目前在本站看过最有电影、宣传片、uta日记内味儿的，单纯，调皮，还有长期在岛上导致的常识缺陷都很好的表现了出来，但是缺少了原本的那个共情力的刻画，但这也只是相对其他几点而言的，主角的人物性格，重情重义，关键时刻冷静可靠，布局能力强，日常也能做到幽默有趣（为什么幽默？你别管）而且正是这这种重情重义而又可靠的风格，才使得与乌塔的互动才显得自然而又有代入感，标题的那句红色加白色，也完美的映射到了两人的互动中
再说到剧情安排，目前的安排可以说是完美的回避了，red中本来会出现的悲剧，却又保留了一些原本该直面的矛盾，摧毁了不眠菇，并保留了乌塔对于香克斯的怨气，也为之后真相的展开提前做了铺垫，感情戏的安排至少个人是非常满意的，优秀的天降青梅就是无敌的，期待之后更多的故事吧
至于对于red本身的评价，还有更多的细节讨论，就看这本书，后面会不会有粉丝群吧"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771149168,"group_id":"7580331362670890046","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个平平无奇的作家（多人）","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0qreuX6uznAcOAXRFhR4AzmWH8Fjbxx6cjIY+Lo5HH9","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4ebdc9d45aeb45ceae62b22c041141fe~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707369&x-signature=Bd4bzdTBEgnTiz316I3kx6p93F0%3D","user_id":"3702794166741927","user_name":"烂树根er"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3702794166741927","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":1,"fan_ranklist_title":"殿堂粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7580331362670890046","book_info":{"abstract":"【半跟船】【单女主·乌塔】
